mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAAS_NOTIFICATION (notiNo, memberNo, type, title, content, refType) VALUES (#{notiNo}, #{memberNo}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{refType})
mapper.select: SELECT notiNo, memberNo, title, content, refType, isRead, readDt, createdDt FROM SAAS_NOTIFICATION WHERE notiNo = #{notiNo}
SELECT notiNo, memberNo, type, title, content, isRead, createdDt FROM SAAS_NOTIFICATION WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo}
SELECT notiNo, memberNo, type, title, content, isRead, createdDt FROM SAAS_NOTIFICATION WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo} AND isRead IS FALSE
mapper.update: UPDATE SAAS_NOTIFICATION SET isRead = TRUE WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo} AND isRead IS FALSE
UPDATE SAAS_NOTIFICATION SET deletedDt = NOW() WHERE notiNo = #{notiNo}
mapper.select: SELECT settingNo, memberNo, taskDuePush, taskDueEmail, commentPush, commentEmail, invitePush, inviteEmail, updatedDt FROM SAAS_NOTIFICATION_SETTING WHERE memberNo = #{memberNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE SAAS_NOTIFICATION_SETTING SET taskDuePush = #{request.taskDuePush}, taskDueEmail = #{request.taskDueEmail}, commentPush = #{request.commentPush}, commentEmail = #{request.commentEmail}, invitePush = #{request.invitePush}, inviteEmail = #{request.inviteEmail}, updatedDt = NOW() WHERE settingNo = #{settingNo} AND memberNo = #{memberNo}
